channel.title: The Soul of a New Machine — Audiobook
channel.description: Full audiobook of "The Soul of a New Machine" by Tracy Kidder, narrated by AI voices. A Pulitzer Prize-winning account of a computer engineering team racing to build a new machine at Data General in the late 1970s.
channel.itunes:author: Tracy Kidder
channel.copyright: Original content © Tracy Kidder. This recording is a personal AI-narrated project.

item.title: Prologue — A Good Man in a Storm
item.itunes:title: Prologue — A Good Man in a Storm
item.description: The prologue of Tracy Kidder's Pulitzer Prize-winning "The Soul of a New Machine." Tom West, a mysterious computer engineer, reveals his character during a stormy sailing trip off the coast of Maine — a portrait of the man who will lead a team of engineers to build a new minicomputer at Data General.
item.itunes:summary: The prologue of Tracy Kidder's Pulitzer Prize-winning "The Soul of a New Machine." Tom West, a mysterious computer engineer, reveals his character during a stormy sailing trip off the coast of Maine — a portrait of the man who will lead a team of engineers to build a new minicomputer at Data General.

item.title: Chapter 1 — How to Make a Lot of Money
item.itunes:title: Chapter 1 — How to Make a Lot of Money
item.description: Chapter 1 of Tracy Kidder's Pulitzer Prize-winning "The Soul of a New Machine." The story begins at Data General, where Tom West and his team of engineers are racing to build a new 32-bit minicomputer — the Eagle — before the competition beats them to it. A deep dive into the culture, pressure, and personalities of the computer industry in the late 1970s.
item.itunes:summary: Chapter 1 of Tracy Kidder's Pulitzer Prize-winning "The Soul of a New Machine." The story begins at Data General, where Tom West and his team of engineers are racing to build a new 32-bit minicomputer — the Eagle — before the competition beats them to it. A deep dive into the culture, pressure, and personalities of the computer industry in the late 1970s.
